response: Acme Corp, headquartered in Austin, Texas, achieved strong financial performance with total annual revenue of $54.4 million, representing an 18% year-over-year growth. The company's quarterly revenue showed variation throughout the year, starting at $12.3 million in Q1, peaking at $16.2 million in Q4, with Q2 and Q3 generating $14.1 million and $11.8 million respectively. The 342-employee organization demonstrated consistent growth momentum despite some quarterly fluctuations.
